_instructions: This file contains all my work experience. Edit this file to add,
remove, or update your professional experience on my portfolio.
IMPORTANT: This is a JSON file. Be careful with commas!
- Each experience needs a comma after it EXCEPT the last one
- Each field needs a comma after it EXCEPT the last one in that experience
- id: A unique identifier (any text, no spaces)
- description: Array of key highlights/achievements (bullet points)
- logo: Path to company logo (put images in assets/companies/)
TO ADD AN EXPERIENCE: Copy one of the examples below and modify it
TO REMOVE AN EXPERIENCE: Delete the entire {...} block (and fix commas)

experiences.title: Data Analyst Graduate Assistant
description: Conduct statistical and graph ML analysis on Drosophila larval brain connectome (NetworkX, scikit-learn, NumPy, SciPy, Pandas). Apply modularity maximization and stochastic block models for neural community detection across 1,000+ annotated neurons.

Implement spatial analysis algorithms (k-nearest neighbor, Hopkins statistic, Ripley’s K) to quantify synaptic clustering; co-authored abstract in CSHL Neuronal Circuits 2026 Abstract Book (p. 68). Preparing peer-reviewed manuscript on network-level synapse localization.

Developed modular Python pipelines consolidating 10+ fragmented research scripts into 3 reusable, documented modules under PI Dr. Gabrielle Gutierrez, reducing analysis runtime by ~40% and ensuring full reproducibility across experiments.

experiences.title: Master of Science in Data Science
description: Pursuing advanced coursework in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Applied Machine Learning, and Functional Genomics
Developed multimodal UMAP project for dual-UMAP alignment using GSE140203 SHARE-seq dataset with 34,774 mouse skin cells
Built crash-resistant preprocessing pipeline handling both RNA expression and chromatin accessibility data
Implemented DQN agent for Pokemon battles and comprehensive AI skincare consultant application using RAG pipelines with LangChain and OpenAI's API
Utilized Google Cloud TPU credits for collaborative machine learning projects
Completed extensive work on regression analysis, geospatial data analysis, and algorithms coursework

experiences.title: Associate Data Engineer – Business Process Analytics
description: Engineered production Generative AI data validation system using Anthropic Claude API on Databricks and Snowflake Cortex AI (Mistral-large2), achieving 70% improvement in anomaly detection accuracy across 10M+ records.

Built end-to-end NLP pipeline to parse and persist LLM outputs into Snowflake tables, automating ThoughtSpot BI dashboards for 50+ stakeholders; compressed analytics cycle from days to 3 hours. Managed end-to-end model deployment and production rollout of Streamlit dashboards on Azure for self-service visualization.

Engineered Python pipeline monitoring system parsing Snowflake execution logs to fire real-time email alerts in <120s, reducing downtime 40%+. Built ML classification framework correcting erroneous MDM records across 5M+ rows, cutting manual review 80%.

experiences.title: Associate Data Engineer
description: Designed and executed end-to-end QA testing strategy for SAP-to-Snowflake ETL pipelines, performing systematic dev-to-production data validation across all transformation layers (ILA, ILB, Base Model) using both manual test case design and automated reconciliation scripts; achieved 98% data accuracy via primary key join reconciliation.

Built SQL Server-to-Snowflake data reconciliation system performing primary key join comparisons across millions of records to surface mismatches between source and target environments; auto-generated discrepancy reports compressed migration timeline by60%.

Engineered Python-based automated data quality framework comparing dev and production environments at row, column, and aggregate level — detecting schema drift, transformation errors, and statistical anomalies across 1,000+ Snowflake views; reduced QA cycle time by 90% and cut manual testing effort from days to hours.

Configured and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Azure Repos and YAML across 3 environments (dev, staging, production), reducing manual deployment steps by 70% and cutting release cycle time from days to under 2 hours.

experiences.title: Data Engineering Intern
description: • Built Python regression automation tool certifying data transformations across Snowflake layers; selected as final university thesis (50% of semester grade)
